Facebook X-twitter Instagram Envelope Comments Box SVG icons Used for the like, share, comment, and reaction icons Aldershot & Farnborough Labour and Alex Baker MP 2 days ago The Renter's Rights Bill comes in to force today, making housing fairer for over 20,000 renters across Rushmoor. But laws are only effective when they're enforced locally. That's why, working with our Labour councillors, we are: ✅ Ending no-fault evictions for good. ✅ Holding landlords accountable for housing quality. ✅ Taking direct enforcement action where standards aren’t met. Made possible by a Labour council, working with a Labour MP and Government, to deliver real fairer housing standards for renters. #farnborough #aldershot #Rushmoorsontrack #rushmoorlabour ... See More See Less Play View Comments likes Like love haha angry 42 Comments: 33 Shares: 1 Share Share on Facebook Share on Twitter Share on Linked In Share by Email 33 Comments Comment on Facebook Alex Baker MP is with Buddhist Community Centre UK in England. 2 days ago A real privilege to celebrate Buddha Jayanti today at the Empire in Aldershot, with the Buddhist Centre Community UK (BCCUK). The BCCUK is a living, breathing community at the heart of Aldershot and home to the largest Buddhist community in the UK. It was also great to hear their plans to further invest in and elevate the centre. Organisations like this really shape our wonderful towns. It was to come together and reflect on what Dharma means, removing negativity between us, a value at the centre of today’s celebrations. At a time when the world can feel divided, we need more Dharma in the world. In Aldershot, we stand for a community where everyone belongs and feels proud to call this place home. Dhanyabad and a very happy Buddha Jayanti to all celebrating. #aldershot #farnborough #blackwater #hawley #yateley ... See More See Less View Comme

pages.title: About Me - Alex Baker MP | Aldershot
pages.meta_description: Find out more about my work, campaigns and how to help make our local area better for everyone.
pages.text_excerpt: About Me - Alex Baker MP | Aldershot >>>>>>>>> (Gropup 1 - Necessary Cookies) >>>>>>>>> End (Gropup 1 - Necessary Cookies) Find me on Facebook 020 7219 4085 Email Me HOME ABOUT NEWS CAMPAIGNS Aldershot and Farnborough Labour’s Missions COMMUNITY SURVEY HELP Contact Useful Links Visit Parliament Privacy Policy ABOUT ME Proud to serve the people of Aldershot and Farnborough. ABOUT ME I am very proud to have been elected to serve the people of Aldershot and Farnborough at the 2024 General Election. I live in Farnborough with my husband and two children. This means that representing this area is personal for me – I want the best for the residents of this constituency. So, I was delighted to be the very first Labour MP, and the first woman, to represent this vibrant and dynamic community. I graduated from the University of Birmingham in 2006 and have worked in various roles for the Co-operative Group and, until my election, I worked on the regeneration of Battersea Power Station, one of the UK’s most successful regeneration schemes. I hope to bring the skills I have picked up during my career in the private sector to revitalise this area. I intend to be the most visible and accessible MP that this constituency has ever had, and you will see me out and about on the doorstep and at community events all year round. I hope that this website gives you a flavour of my work. I would be delighted if you would sign-up to receive my regular updates by adding your contact details in the box below. Information about how to contact me, or to see what I am up to in Parliament and how I vote, is available here . SUBSCRIBE FOR REGULAR UPDATES Stay in the know Subscribe to my email newsletter to keep updated on my news, campaigns and work. Subscribe I agree to the Privacy Policy and to receive email updates. SUBSCRIBE FOR REGULAR UPDATES Stay in the know Subscribe to my email newsletter to keep updated on my news, campaigns and work. Subscribe I agree to the Privacy Policy and to receive email updates. GET IN TOUCH I would love to hear from you about what you think my priorities should be as your MP and what matters most to you. I can also help you with issues such as benefits, housing, immigration, tax, the NHS and education. I aim to respond promptly to everyone, but please remember that I have to prioritise constituents with the most urgent or pressing issues. Campaign or policy issues may take a bit longer. There is also a list of other agencies that may help you here . Please use the contact form to get in touch with me. Please remember to provide as many details as possible, including your name, address and full details of your issue. News ALEX BAKER MP’S SPEECH TO PARLIAMENT DURING THE NORTHERN IRELAND TROUBLES BILL CARRY OVER MOTION For months I have been meeting with veterans, pressing Government Ministers, and written directly to the Secretary of State. My message has been clear: we need stronger protections for our veterans in the Northern Ireland Troubles Bill. Read More » Alex Baker MP 28/04/2026 News A £20 million boost for Cherrywood Working together, Alex Baker MP and Rushmoor Borough Council have secured £20 million to invest in the Cherrywood community through Labour’s ‘Pride in Place’ programme. Read More » Alex Baker MP 22/03/2026 News 100 Days to Go: Armed Forces Day is coming home to Aldershot Hundreds of schoolchildren joined service personnel to start the 100 day countdown to the national Armed Forces Day celebrations in Aldershot yesterday Read More » Alex Baker MP 20/03/2026 News New Farnborough Leisure Centre plans get the green light An exciting new leisure centre in Farnborough was given the go-ahead on Wednesday night in what campaigners have hailed as a ‘major victory for local families’. Read More » Alex Baker MP 13/03/2026 News Supporting our Armed Forces and their families in times of crisis There is a sizeable number of civilians and service families with local connections in the Middle East or with loved ones there. They are facing an incredibly challenging and dangerous time and I have been working very hard with my Parliamentary colleagues to make sure everyone is safe. Read More » Alex Baker MP 11/03/2026 News Sink holes, potholes and gaps in accountability Residents are rightly asking when lasting repairs to our roads will be delivered. I have met the Conservative-run County Council to press for clear timelines, transparent communication and a firm plan for permanent repairs, particularly in areas residents have repeatedly flagged with me. But laws are only effective when they're enforced locally. That's why, working with our Labour councillors, we are: ✅ Ending no-fault evictions for good. ✅ Holding landlords accountable for housing quality. ✅ Taking direct enforcement action where standards aren’t met. Made possible by a Labour council, working with a Labour MP and Government, to deliver real fairer housing standards for renters. #farnborough #aldershot #Rushmoorsontrack #rushmoorlabour ... pages.title: Contact - Alex Baker MP | Aldershot
pages.meta_description: I intend to be the most visible and accessible MP that this constituency has ever had, and you will see me out and about on the doorstep and at community events and at my surgeries all year round. I am keen to hear what you think my priorities should be as your MP and what matters most to you.
pages.text_excerpt: Contact - Alex Baker MP | Aldershot >>>>>>>>> (Gropup 1 - Necessary Cookies) >>>>>>>>> End (Gropup 1 - Necessary Cookies) Find me on Facebook 020 7219 4085 Email Me HOME ABOUT NEWS CAMPAIGNS Aldershot and Farnborough Labour’s Missions COMMUNITY SURVEY HELP Contact Useful Links Visit Parliament Privacy Policy CONTACT Would you like to find out more about my campaigns? Please use the contact form below to get in touch. I intend to be the most visible and accessible MP that this constituency has ever had, and you will see me out and about all year round, on the doorstep, at community events and at my surgeries. I am keen to hear what you think my priorities should be as your MP and what matters most to you. I can also help you with issues such as benefits, housing, immigration, the NHS and education. I aim to respond promptly to everyone, but please remember that I have to prioritise constituents with the most urgent or pressing issues. Campaign or policy issues may take a bit longer. There is also a list of other agencies that may help you here . Please use the contact form to get in touch with me. Remember to provide as many details of your issue as possible, and include your name, address, phone number and postcode. Alternatively, you can write to me at: Alex Baker MP, House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA. 020 7219 4085 alex.baker.mp@parliament.uk Contact Newsletter First Name Last Name Phone/Mobile Your Address (inc.
